Implemented spec 05: job_run table + idempotent claim, transaction-processor dispatcher, jobs scheduler wired into fbkl-server, get_salary_cap uncapped window, lock_rosters/trade error-handling fixes. Frontend commissioner console deferred — blocked on GraphQL surface (fbkl-rust-56c). Sub-event discovery deferred to specs 01/03 (fbkl-rust-lcc, fbkl-rust-1dk).

Extracted build_graphql_schema/build_session_layer/build_router/init_db/setup/shutdown_signal into lib.rs; main.rs now thin local bin calling them. Workspace builds, clippy+fmt clean. No business logic changed.

Added fbkl-lambdas crate to workspace with OnceCell-backed db() helper (max_conn=1,min=0,acquire=8s,idle=300s,max_lifetime=600s,sqlx_logging=false). lambda_http 0.14 + lambda_runtime 0.14.4 resolve to http 1.4.1, matching axum 0.8.9. Builds, clippy/fmt clean, identity test passes (skips w/o DB).
Neon provisioned (pooled+direct); app migrations + migrate_sessions run against direct endpoint.

Ported all 11 webapp-logged-in/src/components/ui components to semantic classnames (btn/badge/card/avatar/sheet/tooltip/sidebar-*) via CVA→class mapping + @layer components @apply in global.css. Markers (group/peer/@container), no-scrollbar, runtime-conditional utilities kept inline (@apply can't resolve them). Verified: vite build compiles all @apply; compiled CSS emits identical declarations per class; tsc/oxlint/oxfmt green. Commit fb45fd7. Force-closed: blocker zhw is code-complete on this branch (feat/shadcn-migration) with only its PR pending manual merge, so dv9's code dependency was satisfied.
Added Typography + Stack primitives with @apply/CVA, refactored all 8 migrated components/routes. tsc + oxlint + vite build pass.

Added max-discount caps to UFA re-sign math in free_agent_extension.rs. Collapsed the two uncapped helpers into discounted_salary(bid, rate, Option<cap>). Wiring per codebase enum semantics (contract_entity.rs:289-304, NOT the spec's inverted table): RFA=10% uncapped floored at RFA salary (standard 4th-yr=rookieY3+20%); UFA-OriginalTeam(UFA-20)=20% cap $8; UFA-Veteran(UFA-10)=10% cap $5. Added discount_caps_apply + resign_rfa_floors_at_standard_salary tests. cargo test -p fbkl-entity: 9 passed; clippy clean (only pre-existing proc-macro-error2 dep warning).

NOT-A-BUG on both reported symptoms. (1) 196/195 penalty: salary_calculation.rs:98 does per-contract ceil(0.2*salary), which rules 9.1.2 (notes/2025-08-31-rules_document.md:227) explicitly mandate ('Salaries may not be combined for drop penalties'). 196/195 is faithful to rules, not over-rounding. (2) Import halts on error: pure ? propagation (import-data) + prior live run confirmed halt with nonzero exit; user's 'didn't stop' was a stale binary/partial DB. Real remaining problem (EoSY2015 fresh-replay duplicate unique-active-contract crash) split out to fbkl-rust-bei; needs a live import run to root-cause. No code change.
Clippy pedantic+nursery workspace lints enabled, 244 warnings fixed to 0, lefthook -D warnings, idiomatic-rust skill distilled from 3 sites

Phase 1 real-bug fixes shipped. Migration: seed_positions down() no longer wipes player table (removed unfiltered delete_many); dropped bogus .auto_increment() on TeamTrade FK cols. Entity: draft_pick_option status transitions now an exhaustive match (no missing-variant panic); trade.rs double-unwrap on Set(None) guarded via let-Some; annual_contract_advancement salary .to_string().parse().unwrap() -> to_i16() propagate (i16-overflow crash). Logic: validate_rosters team_contracts[0].team_id.unwrap() -> threaded team_id:i64 param; fa_auction maybe_override_effective_date wired through sign_auction_contract_to_team (FA effective_date now honors override; veteran passes None, behavior preserved); create_team_contracts .expect(team_id) -> ok_or_else propagate. import-data: ~30 unwrap/panic/OOB sites across import_players (NBA JSON), process_seasonal_transactions (deadline OOB), csv_transaction_utils, seasonal_keeper_deadline_contracts (filter_map panic), import_original_team_contracts, import_teams/import_draft_picks/parse_draft_picks -> propagate-or-skip-and-log (delegated to subagent, diff reviewed). Verified: cargo build + test (37 pass) + clippy (0 warnings from changes) green on workspace; import-data cargo build green. Deferred Ok(1) TBD-salary sentinel to fbkl-rust-0kb.6 (needs nullable column = Phase 4).

Return Result<T, FbklError> from leaking GraphQL resolvers (league/team/player/contract modules); added FbklError::Internal(Report) redacted wrapper (logs full chain server-side) + BadRequest. session::get_current_user now returns Result<Option, FbklError>; GraphQL handler fails closed on outage. build+clippy+fmt+test green. PR #78.

Error architecture done except the large LogicError piece (split to fbkl-rust-0kb.7). Delivered: (1) AuthError enum in auth crate (thiserror, #[from] hex/argon2), FbklError now wraps single Auth variant, dropped pub extern crate re-exports; (2) entity query consistency — league/user/user_registration_queries.rs converted Result<T,DbErr>->color_eyre::Result to match the other 20 query files; (3) session.rs enforce_logged_in returns Result<i64,FbklError>; (4) GraphQL DbErr server-side logging — find_leagues_by_user + create_league_with_commissioner now color_eyre::Report so resolver ? routes through From<Report> which logs (no HTTP callers => no double-log); (5) 31 DbErr::Custom messages lowercased across 7 entity files. Verified: cargo build + clippy -D warnings + test (all pass) + fmt. LogicError deferred: zero consumers match on error kind (speculative), 30-file blast radius.

Phase 4 clean no-schema items done. (1) transaction-processor ProcessableEvent: 5 identical-payload variants -> struct{league_id,end_of_season_year,auction_id,kind:ProcessableEventKind}; dropped 3 re-matching accessors. (2) idempotency_key: replaced {:?} Debug with JobEventKind::to_value() (stable string_value contract, rename-proof); persisted key byte-identical (test pins '7:2027:FaAuctionClose:auction-99'). (3) free_agent_extension: narrowed ContractKind->FreeAgentKind 3-kind enum, killed 3 mut + unreachable bail arm, single match expr. (4) seasonal_trade_transactions (import-data SUBMODULE): '' owner sentinel -> Option<String>, get_status()=match, owner_name() expect helper. (5) GraphQL Contract: stored PlayerRef enum instead of 2 Options, from_model now fallible (catches both-none at construction), scalar fields derived; FE-facing schema unchanged. cargo test workspace green (37 tests), clippy clean on entity/server/transaction-processor + import-data lib. Entity-Model enum items infeasible as written (SeaORM FK columns) -> transaction_entity redesign spun out to fbkl-rust-0kb.8; other entity items deferred to schema pass. NOTE: import-data change is in the git submodule (own remote); push there + bump parent pointer.

Resolved as display-fix + documented-intent (not full nullable schema change — cost/benefit poor, sentinel never corrupts cap math since UFA kinds excluded from CONTRACT_TYPES_COUNTED_TOWARD_CAP). Named the Ok(1) sentinel TBD_UFA_SALARY with doc comment (entity/.../annual_contract_advancement.rs). GraphQL Contract.salary now Option<i16>: None for UFAOriginalTeam/UFAVeteran (server/.../contract_types.rs); schema regen -> salary: Int. Frontend shows 'TBD' for null (LeagueRosterListPlayer), defensive ?? 0 in reduce/sort (LeagueTeamRoster). Verified: cargo build+test (all advancement tests green)+clippy clean; pnpm graphql regen + oxlint + tsc clean.

Not reproducible on a genuinely fresh replay. Full replay 2015->2026 completes clean (EXIT=0), 0 duplicate-active-contract violations, 14622 contracts / 5698 transactions. Root cause per bei's own note: 7eb's failure came from a non-fresh DB; collision needs corrupted starting state, no code defect in advance_contract chain. Fresh-replay recipe recorded in issue note. Scratch DB fbkl_bei retained as the .8 round-trip baseline.
